title: Latvia ranked among the world's top 20 democracies in Swedish research
summary_full: The annual Democracy Report from the V-Dem Institute at the University of Gothenburg lists Latvia among the top countries in the world when it comes to actively implementing the principles of liberal democracy in 2025.
